title: Making a Doctor Appointment
scene: 你打电话预约医生。

turns.en: Dr. Smith's office. How may I help you?
Hi, I'd like to make an appointment.
What's the reason for your visit?
I've had headaches for about a week.

turns.cn: 下周二下午两点可以吗？
turns.en: How about next Tuesday at two PM?
That works. Should I arrive early?

turns.cn: 提前十五分钟，带上保险卡。
turns.en: Fifteen minutes early, and bring your insurance card.

title: Wrong Number
scene: 你打错了电话。

turns.en: Hello?
Hi, is this the pizza place?
No, you have the wrong number.
I'm so sorry to bother you.
No problem. Goodbye.
Goodbye, and sorry again.

title: Calling Customer Service
scene: 你的网络断了，打客服电话。

turns.cn: 感谢您致电，请问账号后四位？
turns.en: Thanks for calling. May I have the last four digits of your account?
Five six seven eight. My internet has been down since last night.

turns.cn: 我远程检测一下……路由器需要重启。
turns.en: Let me run a remote test. Your router needs a reboot.
I tried that already. It still doesn't work.

turns.cn: 我安排技师明天上午上门。
turns.en: I'll schedule a technician for tomorrow morning.
What time roughly? I'll be home.

turns.cn: 九点到十二点之间，会提前打电话。
turns.en: Between nine and noon. They'll call ahead.

title: Leaving a Voicemail
scene: 朋友没接电话，你留语音留言。

turns.en: Please leave a message after the tone.
Hey, it's Zhang Wei.

turns.cn: 今晚的电影改到八点了。
turns.en: The movie tonight has been moved to eight o'clock.
Let's meet at the entrance of the AMC theater.
Call me back when you get this. Thanks!

turns.cn: 留言结束，按井号键发送。
turns.en: End of message. Press pound to send.

title: Ordering Pizza Delivery
scene: 你打电话订披萨外卖。

turns.en: Pizza House. What can I get for you?

turns.cn: 我要一个大号芝士披萨。
turns.en: I'd like a large cheese pizza, please.

turns.cn: 要加配料吗？配送还是自取？
turns.en: Any toppings? Delivery or pickup?
Add pepperoni. Delivery, please.
May I have your address and phone number?
One twenty-three Main Street. My number is five five five, zero one nine nine.

turns.cn: 大概三十五分钟到，一共十八块五。
turns.en: It'll be about thirty-five minutes. That's eighteen fifty total.

title: Calling in Sick
scene: 你生病了，打电话向公司请假。

turns.en: Hello?

turns.cn: 经理，我是张伟，今天身体不舒服想请病假。
turns.en: Hi, it's Zhang Wei. I'm not feeling well and need to take a sick day.
What's wrong? Is it serious?

turns.cn: 发烧三十八点五度，医生让我休息。
turns.en: I have a fever of 101.3. The doctor told me to rest.

turns.cn: 好的，好好休息。急事我发邮件。
turns.en: Okay, get some rest. I'll email if anything urgent comes up.

turns.cn: 今天的会议我会看录像。
turns.en: I'll watch the recording of today's meeting.
Sounds good. Hope you feel better tomorrow.

title: Calling the Landlord
scene: 厨房水管漏水，你给房东打电话。

turns.en: Hello?

turns.cn: 房东您好，我是302的张伟，厨房水管在漏水。
turns.en: Hi, this is Zhang Wei in unit 302. The kitchen pipe is leaking.

turns.cn: 漏得厉害吗？先把总阀关掉。
turns.en: Is it bad? Turn off the main valve first.

turns.cn: 总阀在哪里？我不太清楚。
turns.en: Where's the main valve? I'm not sure.
Next to the water meter. Turn it counterclockwise.
It's off now. There's a lot of water on the floor.
I'll send a repairman this afternoon.

title: Canceling a Reservation
scene: 你临时有事，打电话取消餐厅预订。

turns.en: Italian Bistro. How may I help you?

turns.cn: 你好，我想取消今晚七点的预订。
turns.en: Hi, I need to cancel my reservation for seven tonight.
May I have your name? How many in your party?
Zhang Wei, party of four.
I found it. Shall I cancel it?

turns.cn: 是的，非常抱歉临时变动。
turns.en: Yes, please. I'm sorry for the last-minute change.
No problem. We hope to see you another time.

title: Calling a Cab
scene: 你在酒店前台请工作人员帮忙叫车。

turns.cn: 你好，能帮我叫一辆出租车吗？
turns.en: Hi, could you call a taxi for me?
Of course. Where are you headed?
JFK Airport, Terminal 4.

turns.cn: 大概需要四十分钟，要现在叫吗？
turns.en: That'll take about forty minutes. Shall I call one now?

turns.cn: 是的，我十一点半的飞机。
turns.en: Yes. My flight is at eleven thirty.

turns.cn: 车五分钟后到门口，车牌我会短信给您。
turns.en: It'll be at the entrance in five minutes. I'll text you the plate number.
Thank you!

title: Confirming an Appointment
scene: 牙科诊所来电，你确认预约时间。

turns.cn: 您好，阳光牙科，提醒您明天上午十点有预约。
turns.en: Hi, this is Sunny Dental calling to remind you of your ten AM appointment tomorrow.
Yes, I'll be there on time.

turns.cn: 请提前十分钟到，带上保险卡。
turns.en: Please arrive ten minutes early and bring your insurance card.

turns.cn: 如果临时有事能改时间吗？
turns.en: Can I reschedule if something comes up?

turns.cn: 提前二十四小时通知可以免费改期。
turns.en: Yes, with twenty-four hours' notice there's no fee.
Got it. See you tomorrow.

turns.cn: 明天见，祝您有美好的一天。
turns.en: See you then. Have a great day.

title: Prescription Refill
scene: 你打电话请药房续处方药。

turns.en: Pharmacy. How can I help?

turns.cn: 我想续处方，姓张，降压药。
turns.en: I need a refill. Last name Zhang. Blood pressure medication.

turns.cn: 医生授权还没更新，我联系诊所。
turns.en: The doctor hasn't renewed it yet. I'll call the clinic.

turns.cn: 药只剩两天了，能加急吗？
turns.en: I only have two days left. Can you rush it?
You can pick it up today once the clinic calls back.

turns.cn: 好的，到了发短信提醒我。
turns.en: Okay. Please text me when it's ready.
Will do.

title: School Absence
scene: 孩子生病了，你打电话向学校请假。

turns.en: Sunny Elementary office.

turns.cn: 你好，我是三年二班小明的家长，他今天发烧请假。
turns.en: Hi, I'm Tommy's parent from class three-two. He has a fever and won't be in today.
Full name and student ID, please.
Zhang Xiaoming, ID two zero two four zero three one five.

turns.cn: 记下了，明天带医生条如果超过三天。
turns.en: Noted. Bring a doctor's note if he's out more than three days.

turns.cn: 好的，作业能请同学带回来吗？
turns.en: Okay. Can a classmate bring homework home?

turns.cn: 我让老师发到家长邮箱。
turns.en: I'll have the teacher email it to parents.

title: Utility Outage Report
scene: 整栋楼停电，你打电话给电力公司。

turns.en: Power company. What's your address?
Four fifty-six Oak Avenue. The whole building is out.

turns.cn: 我们已有故障报告，抢修队在路上。
turns.en: We have an outage report. Crews are on the way.
How long until it's back?

turns.cn: 预计三小时内，会发短信更新。
turns.en: About three hours. We'll text you updates.
What about food in the fridge?

turns.cn: 四小时以内通常没问题。
turns.en: It should be fine for about four hours.

title: Making a Hair Appointment
scene: 你打电话预约周末理发。

turns.cn: 美发沙龙，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Hair salon. How can I help?

turns.cn: 想预约周六下午剪发，男士。
turns.en: I'd like a men's haircut Saturday afternoon.

turns.cn: 两点或四点有空，指定发型师吗？
turns.en: Two or four PM is open. Any stylist preference?
Lisa cut my hair last time. Is she available?
Four o'clock works. Haircuts are thirty-five.
Great. Last name Zhang.

turns.cn: 预约好了，请提前五分钟到。
turns.en: You're booked. Please arrive five minutes early.

title: Child Late to School
scene: 早上堵车，你打电话告诉学校孩子迟到。

turns.en: Sunny Elementary office.

turns.cn: 你好，三年二班张小明今天会迟到大概二十分钟。
turns.en: Hi, Tommy Zhang in class three-two will be about twenty minutes late today.
May I ask the reason?

turns.cn: 路上堵车，已经在路上了。
turns.en: Traffic jam. We're on the way.

turns.cn: 好的，到校请来办公室签到。
turns.en: Okay. Please check in at the office when he arrives.
Does a parent need to come inside?

turns.cn: 不用，孩子带迟到条就行。
turns.en: No, he can bring a late slip from us.

title: Parent-Teacher Conference
scene: 你打电话预约家长和老师面谈。

turns.en: Ms. Wang, third-grade math.

turns.cn: 你好，我是张小明的家长，想约家长会。
turns.en: Hi, I'm Tommy's parent. I'd like to schedule a parent-teacher conference.

turns.cn: 下周三四点半后有空档。
turns.en: I have slots after four thirty next Wednesday.
Does five PM Wednesday work?
Yes. Meet me at the front desk.
Should I bring anything?

turns.cn: 带上最近的测验卷就行。
turns.en: Just bring his recent test papers.

title: Insurance Claim Status
scene: 你打电话问医疗保险理赔处理到哪了。

turns.cn: 健康保险客服，保单号后四位？
turns.en: Health insurance. Last four digits of your policy?
Eight eight two one. My dental claim from last month is still pending.

turns.cn: 我查一下……还缺诊所的详细账单。
turns.en: Let me check. We're still missing the itemized bill from the clinic.

turns.cn: 我让诊所传真过去可以吗？
turns.en: Can the clinic fax it to you?

turns.cn: 可以，传真号在网站联系我们页面。
turns.en: Yes. The fax number is on our contact page.
How many days after you receive it?
Usually seven business days.

title: Bank Fraud Alert
scene: 银行来电怀疑盗刷，你确认交易。

turns.cn: 欺诈防范部门，请问您是张伟吗？
turns.en: Fraud prevention. Am I speaking with Zhang Wei?

turns.cn: 是，我看到短信说有一笔可疑消费。
turns.en: Yes. I got a text about a suspicious charge.

turns.cn: 达拉斯电器店二百八十美元，是您刷的吗？
turns.en: Two hundred eighty at an electronics store in Dallas. Was that you?
No. I'm in California.

turns.cn: 我们冻结卡片，新卡五到七天寄到。
turns.en: We'll freeze the card. A new one ships in five to seven days.
How long for the disputed charge to be reversed?

turns.cn: 调查期间临时挂账，通常十四个工作日。
turns.en: A provisional credit during review, usually fourteen business days.

title: DMV Appointment
scene: 你打电话预约 DMV 路考。

turns.cn: 车管局预约热线，需要什么服务？
turns.en: DMV appointments. What do you need?

turns.cn: 我想预约路考，练车许可在这。
turns.en: I'd like to schedule a road test. I have my learner's permit.

turns.cn: 最早下周二上午十点，Oakland分部。
turns.en: Earliest is next Tuesday at ten AM, Oakland office.

turns.cn: 需要带什么？可以借车吗？
turns.en: What should I bring? Can I use a borrowed car?

turns.cn: 保险和登记有效，借车要有车主书面许可。
turns.en: Valid insurance and registration. Borrowed cars need written owner permission.
Okay, please book that slot.
Confirmation text sent.

title: No Heat in Apartment
scene: 公寓暖气不热，你打电话给物业。

turns.en: Maintenance hotline. Unit number?

turns.cn: 502，暖气开了但不热，室内只有十五度。
turns.en: Five oh two. Heat's on but it's only fifty-nine inside.
What is the thermostat set to?

turns.cn: 二十二摄氏度，出风口是冷风。
turns.en: Seventy-two Fahrenheit, but the vent blows cold air.

turns.cn: 技师两小时内到，请在家等候。
turns.en: A tech will come within two hours. Please be home.

turns.cn: 如果今晚还不行怎么办？
turns.en: What if it's still not fixed tonight?
We can bring a space heater temporarily.

title: Reschedule Package Delivery
scene: 你错过快递，打电话改送货时间。

turns.en: Courier support. Tracking number?
One Z nine nine nine AA one oh one two three four five six seven eight four. I wasn't home yesterday.

turns.cn: 可以改明天下午或放驿站。
turns.en: We can redeliver tomorrow afternoon or hold at a pickup point.

turns.cn: 明天下午三点到六点在家。
turns.en: I'll be home tomorrow between three and six PM.

turns.cn: 已更新，司机到达前会打电话。
turns.en: Updated. The driver will call before arrival.
Can they leave it at the door?

turns.cn: 可以备注，但不签名不包丢。
turns.en: We can note that, but no signature means limited liability.

title: Reschedule Dentist
scene: 你临时有事，打电话改牙医预约。

turns.en: Dental office. How may I help you?

turns.cn: 我周五下午三点的洗牙要改期。
turns.en: I need to reschedule my cleaning Friday at three PM.
May I have your name and date of birth?
Zhang Wei, March twelfth, nineteen ninety.

turns.cn: 下周四上午十一点有空。
turns.en: We have eleven AM next Thursday.
That works. Is there a cancellation fee?
Free if you give twenty-four hours notice.

title: HR Pay Stub
scene: 你打电话给 HR 问工资单和扣税问题。

turns.en: Human resources. How can I help?

turns.cn: 我上个月的工资单和实发不一致，能查吗？
turns.en: My last pay stub doesn't match what hit my bank. Can you check?

turns.cn: 员工号和后四位社保号？
turns.en: Employee ID and last four of your Social Security number?
E one zero two four, last four five six seven eight.

turns.cn: 差额是补充医疗保险，明细已发邮箱。
turns.en: The difference is supplemental health insurance. Details were emailed.
When will W-2s be available?
Late January on the employee portal.

title: Declining a Sales Call
scene: 你接到推销电话，礼貌拒绝。

turns.cn: 您好，我们是太阳能安装公司，免费评估。
turns.en: Hi, we're a solar company offering a free home assessment.
Thanks, but I'm not interested right now.

turns.cn: 只要十分钟，能省很多电费。
turns.en: It only takes ten minutes. You could save a lot on power.

turns.cn: 请把我从名单里删掉，不要再打。
turns.en: Please remove me from your list and don't call again.
Okay. Sorry to bother you.
Goodbye.

title: Confirm Interview
scene: HR 来电确认面试时间，你接听并确认。

turns.cn: 您好，我是ABC科技招聘，确认明天面试。
turns.en: Hi, I'm calling from ABC Tech to confirm tomorrow's interview.

turns.cn: 是的，明天上午十点，视频面对面对吧？
turns.en: Yes. Ten AM tomorrow, video call, right?

turns.cn: 对，Zoom链接已发邮箱，请提前五分钟。
turns.en: Correct. Zoom link is in your email. Join five minutes early.
Should I prepare a presentation?

turns.cn: 带项目经历即可，三十分钟技术三十分钟文化。
turns.en: Just be ready to discuss projects. Thirty minutes technical, thirty culture.
Sounds good. See you tomorrow.

title: Prescription Ready
scene: 你打电话问药房处方药是否可取。

turns.en: Pharmacy chain. How can I help?
Last name Zhang. Is my antibiotic ready?
Date of birth?
March twelfth, nineteen ninety.

turns.cn: 好了，今晚九点前取，带保险卡。
turns.en: It's ready. Pick up by nine PM tonight. Bring your insurance card.
About how much is my copay?
Ten dollars.

title: High Utility Bill
scene: 电费突然很高，你打电话询问。

turns.en: Gas and electric. Account number?

turns.cn: 账单比上月高一倍，能查原因吗？
turns.en: My bill doubled from last month. Can you tell me why?

turns.cn: 用量确实增加，可能是暖气或热水器。
turns.en: Usage went up. Could be heating or the water heater.
Can I set up a payment plan?
Yes, three installments with no interest.
Please enroll me in that.
Confirmation text sent.

title: Upgrade Internet Plan
scene: 你打电话升级家里宽带速度。

turns.en: Internet support. What's your account?

turns.cn: 家里网速太慢，想升到三百兆。
turns.en: Home internet is too slow. I'd like three hundred megabits.

turns.cn: 促销价每月七十，路由器可能要换。
turns.en: Promo price seventy a month. You may need a new router.
Is the router free?

turns.cn: 租赁每月五块，或自购兼容型号。
turns.en: Five a month to rent, or buy a compatible model.
I'll rent. When can you install?
A tech can come Saturday morning.

title: Report Minor Accident
scene: 轻微剐蹭，你打电话向车险公司报案。

turns.en: Claims line. Policy number?

turns.cn: 停车场剐蹭，对方走了，我拍了照。
turns.en: Parking lot scrape. The other driver left. I took photos.

turns.cn: 有人受伤吗？警方报告号？
turns.en: Any injuries? Police report number?

turns.cn: 没有受伤，对方没留信息。
turns.en: No injuries. They didn't leave info.

turns.cn: 开理赔单号，修车去合作厂免 deductible。
turns.en: Claim opened. Partner shops may waive your deductible.
Will my premium go up?
Depends on fault and your history.

title: Cancel Doctor Visit
scene: 你身体好了，打电话取消医生预约。

turns.en: Clinic front desk. How may I help you?

turns.cn: 我想取消明天下午头痛的预约。
turns.en: I need to cancel tomorrow's headache appointment.
Name and date of birth?
Zhang Wei, March twelfth, nineteen ninety.

turns.cn: 已取消，提前一天不收费。
turns.en: Cancelled. No fee with one day's notice.
I'll reschedule if symptoms come back.
Take care.

title: Wrong Pizza Order
scene: 外卖送错餐，你打电话投诉。

turns.en: Pizza shop. How can I help?

turns.cn: 订单8821送成素食款了，我要的是香肠。
turns.en: Order eighty-eight twenty-one came vegetarian. I ordered pepperoni.

turns.cn: 非常抱歉，地址是枫树街88号吗？
turns.en: I'm sorry. Is that eighty-eight Maple Street?
Yes. Can you redeliver within twenty minutes?

turns.cn: 马上重做，错的这份您留着。
turns.en: We'll remake it right away. Keep the wrong one.
Can you refund the delivery fee?

turns.cn: 可以，下次下单用优惠码。
turns.en: Yes. We'll text you a promo code.

title: Change Flight
scene: 你打电话给航空公司改航班。

turns.en: Airline reservations. Confirmation code?
ABC one two three. I need Friday on the same route.

turns.cn: 周五下午四点有余位，改期费七十五。
turns.en: Four PM Friday is open. Change fee seventy-five.
Any fare difference?

turns.cn: 再加四十，总共一百一十五。
turns.en: Forty more, one fifteen total.
Okay, please change it.
New itinerary emailed.

title: Vet Appointment
scene: 你打电话给宠物医院预约体检。

turns.en: Animal hospital front desk.

turns.cn: 想给三岁金毛预约年度体检。
turns.en: I'd like an annual checkup for my three-year-old golden retriever.

turns.cn: 疫苗记录带来了吗？下周三有空。
turns.en: Bring vaccination records. Next Wednesday is open.

turns.cn: 上午可以吗？它下午比较焦虑。
turns.en: Morning works better. He gets anxious in the afternoon.

turns.cn: 九点四十五，检查加疫苗大概一百二。
turns.en: Nine forty-five. Exam plus shots about a hundred twenty.
Book it, please. Last name Zhang.
Confirmation text sent.

title: Missed Delivery Callback
scene: 快递员没联系上你，你回拨电话。

turns.cn: 快递，您的包裹在我车上。
turns.en: Courier. I've got your package on the truck.

turns.cn: 抱歉刚才在开会，现在可以送吗？
turns.en: Sorry I missed your call. Can you deliver now?

turns.cn: 二十分钟后到枫树街88号？
turns.en: I can be at eighty-eight Maple in twenty minutes?
Yes. Leave it on the shoe bench by the door.
Do you need a signature?
No, I authorize porch delivery.
Got it. I'll text when I arrive.

title: Calling in Sick
scene: 你发烧了，打电话给上司请假。

turns.en: Hello, Zhang Wei?

turns.cn: 对不起今天去不了，发烧三十八点五度。
turns.en: Sorry, I can't come in today. I have a fever, a hundred point one.

turns.cn: 好好休息，急事我发邮件。
turns.en: Rest up. I'll email if it's urgent.

turns.cn: 今天的会我让同事代汇报。
turns.en: My colleague will cover today's meeting.
Okay. Come back when you're better.
Thanks for understanding.

title: Restaurant Reservation
scene: 你打电话订餐厅位子。

turns.en: Italian restaurant. Good evening.

turns.cn: 想订周六晚上七点半，四位。
turns.en: I'd like a table Saturday at seven thirty for four.
Name? Any allergies?
Zhang. One guest has a nut allergy.

turns.cn: 记下了，到时保留十五分钟。
turns.en: Noted. We'll hold it fifteen minutes.
Could we sit by the window?
We'll try our best.

title: Doctor Running Late
scene: 诊所来电说医生晚了，你听清并确认。

turns.cn: 史密斯诊所，您三点预约要晚二十分钟。
turns.en: Dr. Smith's office. Your three o'clock is running twenty minutes late.

turns.cn: 所以是三点半见我？我没听错吧？
turns.en: So you'll see me at three thirty? Did I hear that right?
Yes, three thirty. Sorry for the delay.

turns.cn: 我可以晚点到，需要改期吗？
turns.en: I can arrive later. Should I reschedule instead?
No need. We can still see you today.
Okay. I'll be there at three thirty.

title: Apartment Buzzer Delivery
scene: 外卖员通过门禁电话找你，你听不清。

turns.en: …delivery… downstairs…
Sorry, could you speak up? Is this food delivery?
Yes. Please buzz me in.
I'll press nine. Leave it at unit eight's door.
Okay.
Thanks.

title: School Bus Stop Change
scene: 学校来电通知校车停靠点变了。

turns.cn: 通知家长，明起校车改到橡树街转角。
turns.en: Parents, the bus stop moves to Oak Street corner starting tomorrow.

turns.cn: 是早上七点十五吗？时间变吗？
turns.en: Still seven fifteen AM? Does the time change?

turns.cn: 时间不变，地点变了，地图发邮件。
turns.en: Same time, new location. Map's in the email.

turns.cn: 收到，请确认是小明那班车。
turns.en: Got it. Please confirm it's Tommy's bus.
Yes, route B.
Thanks for letting us know.

title: Activate Credit Card
scene: 你打电话激活新信用卡。

turns.en: Please enter the last four digits of your card.
Eight eight two three.
Enter the last four of your Social Security number.
Five six seven eight.
Your card is now activated.
Thank you.

title: Payment Extension
scene: 你打电话给账单公司请求延期付款。

turns.en: Billing. Account number?

turns.cn: 这个月能延期两周吗？工资晚发。
turns.en: Can I get a two-week extension? My paycheck is late.

turns.cn: 可以一次，下月十五号前付清。
turns.en: One-time extension. Pay in full by the fifteenth next month.
Is there a late fee?
Waived this time. Please pay on time.
Thank you.

title: Auto Attendant Menu
scene: 你打客服只有语音菜单，找不到人工。

turns.en: For English press one. For billing press three.
Representative. Agent. Operator.
Transferring you to an agent.

turns.cn: 你好，我账单有问题，菜单解决不了。
turns.en: Hi, I have a billing issue the menu couldn't fix.
Please hold.

title: School Absence Follow-up
scene: 孩子请假后，你打电话问老师作业。

turns.cn: 王老师，小明昨天请假，作业是什么？
turns.en: Ms. Wang, Tommy was out yesterday. What's the homework?

turns.cn: 数学第十页，阅读二十分钟。
turns.en: Math page ten and twenty minutes of reading.
Could you email it? I'm afraid I'll miss something.
Sure. I'll send it tonight.
Thank you.
Hope he feels better soon.

title: Gym Class Cancelled
scene: 健身房短信说团课取消，你打电话确认。

turns.cn: 收到短信说今晚瑜伽取消了，对吗？
turns.en: I got a text that tonight's yoga is canceled. Is that right?

turns.cn: 对，教练生病，自动退课额。
turns.en: Yes. Instructor is sick. Credit returned automatically.
Can I move to tomorrow's same class?
Sure. I'll book you in.
Thanks.

title: Pharmacy Refill Reminder
scene: 药房语音提醒该续药，你回电确认。

turns.cn: 提醒您的降压药快用完。
turns.en: Reminder that your blood pressure meds are running low.

turns.cn: 请续一个月，还是老地址取。
turns.en: Please refill one month. Same pickup location.

turns.cn: 医生授权已批，明天下午好。
turns.en: Doctor approved. Ready tomorrow afternoon.
Still ten-dollar copay?
Yes.
Thank you.

title: Physical Therapy Appointment
scene: 你打电话预约运动物理治疗。

turns.en: Physical therapy office. How can I help?

turns.cn: 医生转诊膝盖康复，最早什么时候？
turns.en: Doctor referred me for knee rehab. Earliest appointment?

turns.cn: 下周三八点，带保险卡和转诊单。
turns.en: Next Wednesday eight AM. Bring insurance card and referral.
Wear workout clothes, right?
Yes. Shorts help for evaluation.
Book it, please. Last name Zhang.
